SEARCH
Package de.dhbw.memory.model

Class Game

java.lang.Object
de.dhbw.memory.model.Game
public class Game extends Object
Core game logic: tracks players, the active player, flipped cards, and turn count. The board must already be shuffled before being passed to this constructor.

Typical turn flow:

  1. Player clicks a card → flip(int) returns FlipResult.FIRST_FLIP.
  2. Player clicks a second card → flip(int) returns FlipResult.MATCH or FlipResult.NO_MATCH.
  3. On MATCH: score already updated, same player continues.
  4. On NO_MATCH: controller waits ~1 500 ms, then calls resetMismatch() to hide the cards and switch the active player.
Author:
Markus Wenninger

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Game(List<Player> players, Board board)
    Creates a new game.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FlipResult
    flip(int position)
    Flips the card at position and returns what happened.
    Player
    getActivePlayer()
    Returns the player whose turn it currently is.
    Board
    getBoard()
    Returns the board.
    List<Player>
    getPlayers()
    Returns an unmodifiable view of the player list.
    int
    getTotalTurns()
    Returns the total number of completed turns (each turn = two cards flipped).
    boolean
    isFinished()
    Returns true when every card on the board has been matched.
    boolean
    isTie()
    Returns true when the game is finished and two or more players share the highest score.
    void
    resetMismatch()
    Hides both mismatched cards and switches to the next player.
    Player
    winner()
    Returns the winning player, or null if the game is not finished or if it is a tie.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game(List<Player> players, Board board)
      Creates a new game.
      Parameters:
      players - non-empty list of players; order determines turn order
      board - already-shuffled board
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if players is empty

  • Method Details

    • flip

      public FlipResult flip(int position)
      Flips the card at position and returns what happened.
      Parameters:
      position - 0-based grid position of the card the player clicked
      Returns:
      the result of this flip — see FlipResult

    • resetMismatch

      public void resetMismatch()
      Hides both mismatched cards and switches to the next player. Called by the controller after the flip-back delay (~1 500 ms).

    • isFinished

      public boolean isFinished()
      Returns true when every card on the board has been matched.

    • winner

      public Player winner()
      Returns the winning player, or null if the game is not finished or if it is a tie. For a single-player game this always returns the only player once the game is finished.

    • isTie

      public boolean isTie()
      Returns true when the game is finished and two or more players share the highest score.

    • getActivePlayer

      public Player getActivePlayer()
      Returns the player whose turn it currently is.

    • getTotalTurns

      public int getTotalTurns()
      Returns the total number of completed turns (each turn = two cards flipped).

    • getPlayers

      public List<Player> getPlayers()
      Returns an unmodifiable view of the player list.

    • getBoard

      public Board getBoard()
      Returns the board.
